user.title: Set up FS USB Beacon
user.description: Enter the USB Vendor ID and Product ID for your beacon. The Giants Software FS22 beacon uses VID **340d** and PID **1710**.

confirm.title: Confirm FS USB Beacon
confirm.description: Set up the discovered USB beacon (VID **{vid}** / PID **{pid}**)?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot open the USB HID device. Ensure the beacon is plugged in and that you have the required HID access permissions (see README for udev rules on Linux).
error.invalid_vid_pid: Invalid Vendor or Product ID. Enter them as hexadecimal values without the 0x prefix, e.g. **340d**.

init.title: FS USB Beacon options
init.description: Tune runtime behavior for your beacon.

data_description.default_effect: Effect used when turning on without an explicit effect
data_description.keepalive_interval: How often the integration resends the active command to prevent auto-off
